text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The holiday season is upon us once<n>again. It
comes and goes faster than<n>a runner in the
Satsuki Sho...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Argh! Who ever suggested that I<n>should come
through the chimney?<n>It's narrow beyond belief!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, my bag's all caught up. This<n>calls for a bit of
pushing to make<n>things right!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ack, I've ripped it! But at least it's<n>loose!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hyuck hyuck, indeed I am! Now, hand<n>over yer
gold!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Hold up. It's the holidays, right? No<n>point in
hiding it now...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm Mati-santa Fuku-claus! I'm here<n>to give
presents to all the good boys<n>and girls!
choice_data_list: I'm sorry. Can you say your name again?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oof! Please, could I not? It's not like I<n>didn't say it
right the first time...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway, I have a present for you.<n>Put your hand
in the bag and pull out<n>whatever you like.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm giving out presents, fortune-slip<n>style! I'll give
you whatever you pull<n>out, all right?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I put my hand in and grab the first<n>thing I touch...

Let's take a look... Great fortune!<n>Congratulations!
Pulling great fortune<n>is a gift in itself!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you not happy? Guess I'll<n>have to make
this right. Here, take<n>this!

Ta-dah! Inside the box is a festive<n>tree that's a
thousand years old! A<n>plastic replica of it, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's a good prize. Go on, open it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I unwrap my present and open the<n>box...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait, nooo! The star at the top of the<n>treeeee!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The star has snapped right off. It<n>probably broke
when she snagged it<n>inside the chimney.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, I can only apologize... What<n>sort of
Mati-santa am I...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer. Could you come outside<n>with me for a
moment?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Can I get some glue and<n>tape,
please?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just give me a moment—I'll fix this<n>right up. Uuugh,
this is so<n>embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I really wanted today's celebrations<n>to be a little
more holy-feeling. This is<n>so pathetic...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Sniff... You're so kind!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
While you're being so kind, could I<n>ask you for
another favor? When we<n>get back, could you help
me stick the<n>star back on?

It can wait until after we've eaten our<n>holiday
cake, though. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite the tribulations, we have fun<n>trying to
mend the tree together.<n>Strangely enough, it's
turned out to<n>be a pretty heartwarming holiday.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay, plan B! Time to pull out my<n>secret weapon!
Come on, Trainer, lift<n>the tree high up into the sky!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't it look like there's a real star<n>on top of it
now? How romantic is<n>that!
choice_data_list: I want to have a proper star on top.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ack! My little illusion wasn't good<n>enough for
you? I thought I really<n>turned on the charm there...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I guess I'd better use the star that felloff, huh? Sigh...
choice_data_list:
Why don't you use the star that you'll win at the
Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? The Arima Kinen? That's still<n>coming... up...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see what you did there! That<n>was actually
pretty cool. Seems I'm<n>no match for you.
choice_data_list: Promise me you'll get that star?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer... Y-yeah, I'll do it. By the<n>way...

You're dressed to impress today,<n>huh? My heart
is racing just looking<n>at you...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My face is so red, I'm about to<n>become
Matikane-feelin'-the-heat-now. Wait,<n>we're right
in the middle of winter.<n>Did I just flub another
joke?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We still don't have the star we need<n>for the tree.
It's time to go and win it<n>for ourselves.
